name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: At 819 Virginia St in Seattle, WA, Western Union Money Order Only provides 24-hour money order services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only operates 24/7 at 819 Virginia St in downtown Seattle, WA. This standalone location serves the Pioneer Square neighborhood with around-the-clock access to money orders, cashier's checks, and check-cashing services. Whether you're a Seattle resident or just passing through, this location's 24-hour operation means you can handle financial transactions at any time of day or night.

This Seattle location specializes in money order processing and check cashing for customers throughout WA. You can call ahead at +1 206-623-0413 to verify availability or discuss your specific needs before visiting. The staff can assist with both domestic and international money orders, making it a convenient option for the diverse population in Seattle.

If you're in Seattle and need to send money or cash a check outside of traditional banking hours, the 819 Virginia St location is an ideal solution. Bring a valid government-issued ID and funds if you're cashing checks. As a dedicated money order and check-cashing specialist, Western Union Money Order Only provides focused service for these essential financial needs.
pros: Extensive network with hundreds of agent locations including Walmart, grocery chains, and bank partners across the US
Hybrid service model: start transfer online/via app and complete in person to save time at counter
Money orders available as trusted alternative to checks with purchase and cashing at participating locations
Same-day or quick cash pickup available for received transfers via MTCN verification
Multiple payment options accepted: cash, debit card, and credit card at select locations
Free first online international money transfer
Bill payment services available at participating locations (utilities, rent, car payments)
Operational since 1851 with stated encryption and fraud prevention protections
cons: No currency exchange services provided at physical locations—international recipients get local currency based on rate at time of transfer with no control over exchange
Pricing varies significantly between online and in-person transactions; website encourages users to use cost calculator but doesn't publish standard rates
Service hours depend on host location (Walmart, grocery store, bank partner) rather than dedicated Western Union hours, creating inconsistent availability
Limited details on fees structure provided—customers must contact specific location or use calculator to determine actual costs
Money orders must be cashed at participating locations or deposited in bank account; not all Western Union locations process them
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing reliable in-person cash transfer and money order services
People sending domestic or international remittances to family or friends without bank accounts
Bill payers without online banking access who need in-person utility, rent, or payment services
Consumers preferring to initiate transfers online but complete transactions in physical locations with cash
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers who need reliable, in-person money transfer and payment services and prefer physical transaction locations over digital-only platforms. The main caveat is that pricing is opaque and varies considerably by method and destination—users must actively compare costs and understand that in-person transactions may cost differently than online alternatives.
services: Domestic money transfers in person at agent locations
International money transfers with MTCN tracking
Money order purchase at participating locations
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating locations
Cash pickup from transferred funds using MTCN and valid ID
Prepaid Visa Card loading and account opening
Online and mobile app money transfer initiation
In-person money transfer completion with valid ID
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) generation and tracking
Service at retail locations (Walmart, grocery chains, bank partners)
Payment processing (cash, debit card, credit card at select locations)
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 819 Virginia St, Seattle, WA. 24-hour check cashing and money orders.
